experiments.name: transfer_seed_robustness
experiments.description: Repeated transfer runs across incremented seeds to show that the balanced-transfer story is not a single-seed artifact.
experiments.reviewer_goal: Stability and repeatability of the main transfer claim.

experiments.name: search_seed_robustness
experiments.description: Repeated search-suite runs to test whether the search ranking remains competitive under seed variation.

experiments.name: transfer_compute_low_budget
experiments.description: Low-budget transfer stress test with reduced search and sampling budgets.
experiments.reviewer_goal: Check whether the method degrades gracefully under tighter budgets.

experiments.name: transfer_compute_high_budget
experiments.description: High-budget transfer stress test to examine whether the ranking remains favorable when more refinement is allowed.
experiments.reviewer_goal: Budget-sensitivity analysis for the transfer claim.

experiments.name: search_compute_high_budget
experiments.description: Higher-budget search suite to test whether the main search ordering changes under more aggressive refinement.
experiments.reviewer_goal: Budget-sensitivity analysis for the search claim.

experiments.name: mixed_r_transfer_neighborhood
experiments.description: Transfer-neighborhood stress test using mixed-r teacher pools rather than same-r-only pools.
experiments.reviewer_goal: Directly test how local the transferable structure really is.

experiments.name: high_resolution_structure
experiments.description: Higher-resolution structural distillation with more bins and a larger extracted motif pool.

experiments.name: compact_structure
experiments.description: Compact structural distillation with fewer bins and a smaller motif pool.
experiments.reviewer_goal: Check whether conclusions persist under a more compressed representation.

experiments.name: exact_supervision_stress
experiments.description: Stronger exact-supervision setting for weak R(3,s) cells.
experiments.reviewer_goal: Show how much the weak-cell behavior depends on exact supervision strength.

experiments.name: ablation_seed_robustness
experiments.description: Replicated ablation runs to verify that the component ordering is not seed-fragile.
experiments.reviewer_goal: Strengthen confidence in the ablation narrative.

experiments.name: interpretability_seed_robustness
experiments.description: Replicated interpretability/frontier runs to test the stability of the structure-validity separation.
